")

Bash(ssh root@139.180.143.96 bash <<'REMOTE'
MYSQL_PASS="1317de4c9a0b895ef18aca8879747433"

# Remove old container and volumes
docker stop payment-mysql && docker rm payment-mysql
docker volume rm payment-mysql-data payment-mysql-data-v2 2>/dev/null

# Start fresh MySQL 5.7
docker run -d --name payment-mysql \\
    --restart always \\
    --network payment-net \\
    -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD="$MYSQL_PASS" \\
    -e MYSQL_DATABASE=epusdt \\
    -p 127.0.0.1:3306:3306 \\
    mysql:5.7

echo "Waiting for MySQL 5.7..."
for i in $\(seq 1 30\); do
    docker exec payment-mysql mysqladmin ping -uroot -p"$MYSQL_PASS" --silent 2>/dev/null && echo "Ready!" && break
    sleep 2
done

docker exec payment-mysql mysql -uroot -p"$MYSQL_PASS" -e "SELECT VERSION\(\);" 2>&1
docker exec payment-mysql mysql -uroot -p"$MYSQL_PASS" -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS dujiaoka CHARACTER SET utf8mb4;" 2>&1

# Restore dujiaoka from install.sql
docker cp dujiaoka:/dujiaoka/database/sql/install.sql /tmp/dujiaoka_install.sql
docker exec -i payment-mysql mysql -uroot -p"$MYSQL_PASS" dujiaoka < /tmp/dujiaoka_install.sql 2>&1
echo "=== dujiaoka tables ==="
docker exec payment-mysql mysql -uroot -p"$MYSQL_PASS" dujiaoka -e "SHOW TABLES;" 2>&1 | wc -l

# Create admin for dujiaoka  
docker exec dujiaoka php artisan tinker --execute "
\\$hash = bcrypt\('33543613'\);
DB::table\('admin_users'\)->updateOrInsert\(
    ['username' => 'shelly1998'],
    ['username' => 'shelly1998', 'password' => \\$hash, 'name' => '管理员', 'created_at' => now\(\), 'updated_at' => now\(\)]
\);
echo 'Admin created';
" 2>&1

# Now test epusdt
echo "=== Test epusdt ==="
cd /opt/epusdt && timeout 10 ./epusdt http 2>&1 &
PID=$!
sleep 8
echo "=== port check ==="
ss -tlnp | grep 8000
echo "=== epusdt tables ==="
docker exec payment-mysql mysql -uroot -p"$MYSQL_PASS" epusdt -e "SHOW TABLES;" 2>&1
kill $PID 2>/dev/null
wait $PID 2>/dev/null
REMOTE)

USE epusdt;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `orders` \(
  `id` bigint\(20\) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `trade_id` varchar\(32\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `order_id` varchar\(32\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `amount` decimal\(10,4\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `actual_amount` decimal\(10,4\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `token` varchar\(50\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `expiration_time` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `checkout_url` varchar\(500\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `notify_url` varchar\(500\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `redirect_url` varchar\(500\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` int\(11\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `block_transaction_id` varchar\(100\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `deleted_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY \(`id`\),
  UNIQUE KEY `trade_id` \(`trade_id`\),
  UNIQUE KEY `order_id` \(`order_id`\)
\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wallet_addresses` \(
  `id` bigint\(20\) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `token` varchar\(50\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` int\(11\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `deleted_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY \(`id`\)
\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
SQL

REMOTE)

VALUES \(\\"USDT-TRC20\\", \\"epusdt\\", 1, 3, \\"${EPUSDT_TOKEN}\\", \\"\\", \\"http://epusdt:8000/api/v1/order/create-transaction\\", \\"pay/epusdt\\", 1, NOW\(\), NOW\(\)\);
" 2>&1

echo "Payment config done"
')

')
